name: Daily Marketing Email Generator
description: Generates and stores marketing email campaigns using the marketing agent
nodes_description: 2. HTTP Request: calls /chat with marketing agent
3. Parses response for subject line + body
setup_instructions: Body: {"message": "Write a marketing email for our weekly restaurant newsletter. Include subject line, preview text, and body.", "agent_type": "marketing"}
5. Add Postgres node → INSERT into agent_memory

body.message: Write a marketing email for our weekly newsletter
